TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ciyaw_Anang_Kuwuli_Cencetasiyi_Yimcumincu_yinciwcongsin, title = Ciyaw_Anang_Kuwuli_Cencetasiyi_Yimcumincu_yinciwcongsin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ciyaw_Anang_Kuwuli_Cencetasiyi_Yimcumincu_yinciwcongsin} }

S.FORM: Ciyaw Anang Kuwuli Cencetasiyi Yimcumincu yinciwcongsin Ina Kuw-li-cen-c tasiyi misatapangay a patatudung a mikiwkiw tu suwal atu serangawan nu Yincumin a pipasubana'an. Belung han ku taratarakaway a tapang amin a sitatudung, atu hekalay nu cacudadan a mitapangaytu a midemak tu rayray nu Yin-cu-min a sibalucuay a mitekaay amin. Nay i 1999 a miheca a patireng, satapang sa a panganga tu: Yin-cu-min-cu i-yin-ci-yaw-i wen-hu-wa yin-ci-yu cung-sin, parumasa tu "ALCD" sa. Tangasa satu i 2007 a miheca macakat tu "satapangay a "yin-ci-yu cung-sin" han. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: ʦijaw anaŋ ko~u~uwo~u~uɾi ʦənʦətasiji jimʦo~u~uminʦo~u~u jinʦiwʦo~uŋsin ina ko~u~uw-ɾi-ʦən-ʦ tasiji misatapaŋaj a patato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ a mikiwkiw to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ ato~u~u səraŋawan no~u~u jinʦo~u~umin a pipaso~u~ub~b~vanaʡan. b~b~vəɾo~u~uŋ ħan ko~u~u taratarakawaj a tapaŋ amin a sitato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ, ato~u~u ħəkaɾaj no~u~u ʦaʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan a mitapaŋajto~u~u a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u~u rajraj no~u~u jin-ʦo~u~u-min a sib~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uaj a mitəkaaj amin. naj i **** a miħəʦa a patirəŋ, satapaŋ sa a paŋaŋa to~u~u: jin-ʦo~u~u-min-ʦo~u~u i-jin-ʦi-jaw-i wən-ħo~u~u-wa jin-ʦi-jo~u~u ʦo~u~uŋ-sin, paro~u~umasa to~u~u "aɾʦɬ~ɮ" sa. taŋasa sato~u~u i **** a miħəʦa maʦakat to~u~u "satapaŋaj a "jin-ʦi-jo~u~u ʦo~u~uŋ-sin" ħan. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
S.FORM: Ciyaw Anang Kuwuli Cencetasiyi Yimcumincu yinciwcongsin Ina Kuw-li-cen-c tasiyi misatapangay a patatudung a mikiwkiw tu suwal atu serangawan nu Yincumin a pipasubana'an. Belung han ku taratarakaway a tapang amin a sitatudung, atu hekalay nu cacudadan a mitapangaytu a midemak tu rayray nu Yin-cu-min a sibalucuay a mitekaay amin. Nay i 1999 a miheca a patireng, satapang sa a panganga tu: Yin-cu-min-cu i-yin-ci-yaw-i wen-hu-wa yin-ci-yu cung-sin, parumasa tu "ALCD" sa. Tangasa satu i 2007 a miheca macakat tu "satapangay a "yin-ci-yu cung-sin" han. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: ʦijaw anaŋ ko~u~uwo~u~uɾi ʦənʦətasiji jimʦo~u~uminʦo~u~u jinʦiwʦo~uŋsin ina ko~u~uw-ɾi-ʦən-ʦ tasiji misatapaŋaj a patato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ a mikiwkiw to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ ato~u~u səraŋawan no~u~u jinʦo~u~umin a pipaso~u~ub~b~vanaʡan. b~b~vəɾo~u~uŋ ħan ko~u~u taratarakawaj a tapaŋ amin a sitato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ, ato~u~u ħəkaɾaj no~u~u ʦaʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan a mitapaŋajto~u~u a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u~u rajraj no~u~u jin-ʦo~u~u-min a sib~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uaj a mitəkaaj amin. naj i **** a miħəʦa a patirəŋ, satapaŋ sa a paŋaŋa to~u~u: jin-ʦo~u~u-min-ʦo~u~u i-jin-ʦi-jaw-i wən-ħo~u~u-wa jin-ʦi-jo~u~u ʦo~u~uŋ-sin, paro~u~umasa to~u~u "aɾʦɬ~ɮ" sa. taŋasa sato~u~u i **** a miħəʦa maʦakat to~u~u "satapaŋaj a "jin-ʦi-jo~u~u ʦo~u~uŋ-sin" ħan. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
